signals.headline: BTC ETFs 5-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
BTC ETFs 5-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $238.37 million in net inflows on April 20, extending a 5 consecutive day streak—the firmest institutional buying since February—led by BlackRock’s IBIT at $256.05 million[1][3]. This structural demand signal, amid BTC at ~$78,500 (+3.6%), could shift prediction markets on Bitcoin price targets like
matched_markets: Will the price of Bitcoin be between $76,000 and $78,000 on April 24?

ETH ETFs 8-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
